title: oeosporangium mairei
intro: Oeosporangium mairei, a type of fern found in the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, is a medicinal plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. Oeosporangium mairei has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it is also believed to have antiviral and antibacterial properties that can help prevent infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
